name: Cheesy Potato Skins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Scrub potatoes thoroughly and rub skin with oil. Bake for 1 hour or until done. Allow potatoes to cool to touch.
3. Cut each potato in half lengthwise. Carefully scoop out the pulp, leaving a 1/4- to 1/8-inch shell. Save the pulp for another recipe.
4. Cut skins in half crosswise and deep fry in hot oil for 32 minutes until lightly browned. Drain on paper towels.
5. Place skins on a baking sheet. Sprinkle with salt, cheese, and bacon.
6. Place under broiler until cheese melts.
Yield: 1 dozen small servings
